examples: It was no accident that many leading Roman soldiers and statesmen were writers of high caliber.
The enemy was armed only with low caliber guns.
But I worked my life to get to a place of this caliber.
It isn't unprecedented for a player of Stoudemire's caliber to move to the three-point line.
They'll react to a sniper, and they will engage targets with a 50-caliber machine gun.
